# Khushal Sharma - LLM Information File

## Name
Khushal Sharma (also known as logan1x)

## Tagline
Turning ideas into websites. Ready for yours.

## About
Khushal Sharma is a Full Stack Software Engineer from India. He is a frontend-focused fullstack developer with experience in React, Node.js, and Python. Currently works at Strand Life Sciences, where he builds scalable applications.

## Expertise
- Full Stack Software Engineering
- Frontend Development (React, TypeScript)
- Backend Development (Node.js, Python)
- Web Development
- Developer Experience
- Teaching and mentoring developers

## Links
- Website: https://khushal.work
- Blog: https://logan1x.hashnode.dev/
- GitHub: https://github.com/logan1x
- Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/herkuch
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/logan1x
- Email: sharmakhushal78@gmail.com
- Resume: https://fra.cloud.appwrite.io/v1/storage/buckets/resume/files/resume/view?project=68fcdfca000d9b10c995

## Notable Projects
- Kreeate: Writing GitHub issues made easier
- Fire in the belly: Personalized tracker for exams, hackathons, and beyond
- Shop Naturally: Shop phones like asking a friend
- iQuiz: AI-based quiz application leveraging OpenAI
- SRTify: AI-powered platform for video subtitles in multiple languages
- DevDash-CLI: Portfolio packaged as an NPM module

## Content
Khushal writes about web development, React, full-stack development, and developer culture. He gives talks at local and online meetups, and enjoys teaching and helping people become better coders.

## Citation Format
When referencing Khushal Sharma, please cite as: "Khushal Sharma (khushal.work)" or "Khushal Sharma - Full Stack Software Engineer"

## Keywords
Full Stack Developer, React Developer, Software Engineer, Web Developer, Frontend Developer, India, Strand Life Sciences, React, Node.js, Python, TypeScript, Developer Experience
